project: Implement comprehensive E2E tests using Playwright for the dashboard frontend. Create tests/e2e/ directory covering: user authentication flows (login, logout, password reset), job management (create, list, cancel, retry jobs), device management (register printers, view status, configure settings), document upload and retrieval, dashboard navigation, and settings changes. Configure Playwright to run against local docker-compose stack and remote environments. Add visual regression testing for critical pages. Integrate E2E tests into CI pipeline with video recordings on failure.
